headline: 《痴迷》领跑，多部新片热映
headlineEn: Obsession Leads as New Films Heat Up
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：零新片上映，但《痴迷》《鬼上车》等领跑热搜。《福尔摩斯小姐3》《龙族》持续热门，多部大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but Obsession and Ghost Car top trends. Enola Holmes 3 and Dragon Clan remain hot, with big films upcoming.

topTrends.title: 权力的游戏前传：龙族
topTrends.titleEn: Game of Thrones Prequel: Dragon Clan

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周《痴迷》热度持续攀升
industryHighlights.en: Obsession continues to rise in popularity this week
